entries.name: gwin
entries.command: g add -A && g commit -m "chore: commit changes"
entries.description: Stage everything and commit in one shot

entries.name: gwip
entries.description: Quick no-verify WIP commit of everything tracked

entries.name: gfresh
entries.description: Sync with main in one command: checkout + fetch + pull

entries.name: greb
entries.description: Interactive rebase from the point your branch diverged from main

entries.name: gaem
entries.description: Empty commit to trigger CI — gaem "trigger ci"

entries.name: givscode
entries.description: Silence .vscode/settings.json from git without touching .gitignore

entries.name: fbr
entries.command: git fetch && git branch -a | fzf | git checkout ...
entries.description: Fuzzy-find and checkout any local or remote branch via fzf

entries.name: npmd / pnpmd / yarnd / denod
entries.command: npm run dev / pnpm run dev / yarn dev / deno run dev
entries.description: Universal dev server shortcut — same muscle memory across all package managers

entries.name: pyinit
entries.description: Activate the local Python venv without typing the full path

entries.name: rmnpmi
entries.command: rm -rf node_modules && npm cache clean --force && npm i
entries.description: Nuclear npm reset: wipe node_modules, clear cache, reinstall

entries.name: rmmodules
entries.description: Recursively delete every node_modules folder in the current tree

entries.name: rm
entries.description: Route rm through trash so deletes are recoverable, not gone forever

entries.name: secret
entries.description: Generate a cryptographically secure 32-byte hex secret instantly

entries.name: mostused
entries.command: history | awk '{print $2}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | head -n 10
entries.description: Show your top 10 most-used commands from shell history

entries.name: findport
entries.description: What process is listening on this port?

entries.name: killport
entries.command: for port in "$@"; do ... kill -9 $(lsof -t -n -i :$port); done
entries.description: Kill all processes on one or more ports — accepts multiple args

entries.name: findproc
entries.description: Find a running process by name using regex

entries.name: pythonver / nodever
entries.description: List the latest Python or Node release tags straight from GitHub

entries.name: cafe
entries.description: Watch random bytes scroll until they spell 'ca fe' — pointless and mesmerizing

entries.name: busy
entries.command: while true; do ... fake npm install with progress bars ...; done
entries.description: Fake package installation animation — great for demos or looking busy

entries.name: lucky
entries.description: Random fortune from a random cow in rainbow colors
